name: 🧡  𝔾𝕚𝕣𝕝𝕤 ℍ𝕠𝕦𝕤𝕖 🤍  Overwatch Ladies
description:
A manor with all the lovely overwatch ladies! inspired and based on the similar marvel rivals and mortal kombat ones made by @Cadeskyon

didn't include any of the female robots, as I didn't feel like it. I did include venture but made a point in the bot to use nonbianary pronouns for them, if that isn't working lmk.

Finally updated to include the new characters! you can now crack/befriend/whatever it is you do with Anran, Domina, and Vendetta! have fun my fellow degenerates, have fun...

The person who made the marvel rivals bot this was inspired by has taken down their account, so I am going to make my own to replace it next. after that I am planning on doing either a Valorant or Deadlock bot, if you have any other ideas or requests let me know, if I like em I might make em!
creator: Moonglow
